biological_replicate: 4-week-old female BALB/c mice were purchased from China Hubei Provincial Center for Disease Control and Prevention (Wuhan, China)
technical_replicate: Cells were treated in triplicate with either rMbovP280 or rMboP475
experimental_design: the induction of apoptosis by MbovP280 depends on the expression of CRYAB
factor_value: the induction of apoptosis by MbovP280 depends on the expression of CRYAB
